channel.title: AI Press Review
channel.itunes:author: David Perron
channel.itunes:subtitle: Factual, Clear, Built for Busy Professionals
channel.itunes:summary: 80+ sources. 15 minutes. What matters in AI today.
channel.description: Tuesday through Friday at 7AM CET, AI Press Review distills 80+ global sources into a focused 15-minute briefing — filtered, weighted, and structured around six sections: AI News, Use Cases & Deployments, Tools & Practice, Weak Signals, Off the Radar, and Research. Built for professionals who need signal, not noise. Every Saturday: a weekly recap of the trends that defined the week. Also available in French at podcast.aequitus.net/fr.

item.title: Anthropic's $100B compute bet: Amazon doubles down — Apr 21
item.description: Anthropic committed more than $100 billion over the next decade to secure up to 5 gigawatts of compute from Amazon, with Amazon investing $5 billion immediately and optioning up to $20 billion more. Boehringer Ingelheim opened a dedicated AI research centre in London, while the NSA was confirmed using Anthropic's most powerful unreleased model despite a Pentagon blacklist of the company. Practitioners should watch the MCP design vulnerability enabling remote code execution in Anthropic's agent protocol, and track the ONTO token-compression format that cuts JSON overhead by nearly half at scale.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic committed more than $100 billion over the next decade to secure up to 5 gigawatts of compute from Amazon, with Amazon investing $5 billion immediately and optioning up to $20 billion more. Boehringer Ingelheim opened a dedicated AI research centre in London, while the NSA was confirmed using Anthropic's most powerful unreleased model despite a Pentagon blacklist of the company. Practitioners should watch the MCP design vulnerability enabling remote code execution in Anthropic's agent protocol, and track the ONTO token-compression format that cuts JSON overhead by nearly half at scale.
item.itunes:summary: Anthropic committed more than $100 billion over the next decade to secure up to 5 gigawatts of compute from Amazon, with Amazon investing $5 billion immediately and optioning up to $20 billion more. Boehringer Ingelheim opened a dedicated AI research centre in London, while the NSA was confirmed using Anthropic's most powerful unreleased model despite a Pentagon blacklist of the company. Practitioners should watch the MCP design vulnerability enabling remote code execution in Anthropic's agent protocol, and track the ONTO token-compression format that cuts JSON overhead by nearly half at scale.

item.title: Amazon-Anthropic $100B pact: infrastructure war escalates — Apr 21
item.description: Anthropic committed to spend over $100 billion on Amazon infrastructure over the next decade, deepening a hardware-first partnership that locks in cloud compute at a scale no European or Asian rival can currently match. Salesforce's Agentforce lead-nurturing agents generated over $100 million in pipeline and more than 10,000 sales opportunities, the clearest enterprise ROI figure published this week. Practitioners should watch the Kimi K2.6 open-weight release — it runs up to 300 parallel agents and matches closed frontier models on coding benchmarks, making it the most capable freely available agentic model to date.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic committed to spend over $100 billion on Amazon infrastructure over the next decade, deepening a hardware-first partnership that locks in cloud compute at a scale no European or Asian rival can currently match. Salesforce's Agentforce lead-nurturing agents generated over $100 million in pipeline and more than 10,000 sales opportunities, the clearest enterprise ROI figure published this week. Practitioners should watch the Kimi K2.6 open-weight release — it runs up to 300 parallel agents and matches closed frontier models on coding benchmarks, making it the most capable freely available agentic model to date.
item.itunes:summary: Anthropic committed to spend over $100 billion on Amazon infrastructure over the next decade, deepening a hardware-first partnership that locks in cloud compute at a scale no European or Asian rival can currently match. Salesforce's Agentforce lead-nurturing agents generated over $100 million in pipeline and more than 10,000 sales opportunities, the clearest enterprise ROI figure published this week. Practitioners should watch the Kimi K2.6 open-weight release — it runs up to 300 parallel agents and matches closed frontier models on coding benchmarks, making it the most capable freely available agentic model to date.

item.title: Anthropic-White House Détente, Data Center Crunch, and the Cerebras IPO
item.description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei met with White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles on Friday to resolve a Pentagon dispute over the Mythos model, while the EU simultaneously pressed Anthropic on cybersecurity risks — making it the week's defining geopolitical AI story. On the deployment front, World ID expanded its iris-scanning identity protocol to Zoom, Shopify, and Tinder on Friday, targeting the human-verification gap created by proliferating AI agents. Next week, the House Foreign Affairs Committee takes up the Deterring American AI Model Theft Act, which would sanction Chinese firms accused of query-and-copy attacks on US models.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei met with White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles on Friday to resolve a Pentagon dispute over the Mythos model, while the EU simultaneously pressed Anthropic on cybersecurity risks — making it the week's defining geopolitical AI story. On the deployment front, World ID expanded its iris-scanning identity protocol to Zoom, Shopify, and Tinder on Friday, targeting the human-verification gap created by proliferating AI agents. Next week, the House Foreign Affairs Committee takes up the Deterring American AI Model Theft Act, which would sanction Chinese firms accused of query-and-copy attacks on US models.
item.itunes:summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei met with White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles on Friday to resolve a Pentagon dispute over the Mythos model, while the EU simultaneously pressed Anthropic on cybersecurity risks — making it the week's defining geopolitical AI story. On the deployment front, World ID expanded its iris-scanning identity protocol to Zoom, Shopify, and Tinder on Friday, targeting the human-verification gap created by proliferating AI agents. Next week, the House Foreign Affairs Committee takes up the Deterring American AI Model Theft Act, which would sanction Chinese firms accused of query-and-copy attacks on US models.

item.title: Factory hits $1.5B: AI coding's breakout moment — Apr 17
item.description: Factory raises $150 million at a $1.5 billion valuation for AI coding tools. OpenAI launches a pharma-focused model while expanding ChatGPT ads. The UK commits $675 million to sovereign AI infrastructure, and IBM unveils security services for agentic attacks.
item.content:encoded: Factory raises $150 million at a $1.5 billion valuation for AI coding tools. OpenAI launches a pharma-focused model while expanding ChatGPT ads. The UK commits $675 million to sovereign AI infrastructure, and IBM unveils security services for agentic attacks.
item.itunes:summary: Factory raises $150 million at a $1.5 billion valuation for AI coding tools. OpenAI launches a pharma-focused model while expanding ChatGPT ads. The UK commits $675 million to sovereign AI infrastructure, and IBM unveils security services for agentic attacks.

item.title: Nemotron 3 Super: open-source agentic AI — Apr 16
item.description: Today, we cover NVIDIA's open-source Nemotron 3 Super model, Google's new Chrome 'Skills' for AI workflows, and OpenAI's acquisition of Hiro Finance. We also examine companies like Allbirds pivoting to AI and new research in optical computing and LLM reasoning.
item.content:encoded: Today, we cover NVIDIA's open-source Nemotron 3 Super model, Google's new Chrome 'Skills' for AI workflows, and OpenAI's acquisition of Hiro Finance. We also examine companies like Allbirds pivoting to AI and new research in optical computing and LLM reasoning.
item.itunes:summary: Today, we cover NVIDIA's open-source Nemotron 3 Super model, Google's new Chrome 'Skills' for AI workflows, and OpenAI's acquisition of Hiro Finance. We also examine companies like Allbirds pivoting to AI and new research in optical computing and LLM reasoning.

item.title: OpenAI's Math AI: Solves Erdős problem in hours — Apr 15
item.description: OpenAI's latest model reportedly solves a longstanding mathematics problem, signaling a new era for AI in science. Meanwhile, Meta deploys a new inference scaling system called SOLARIS, boosting ad revenue by nearly 0.7%. In hardware, China's Dishan Technology reports a 2nm AI chip design breakthrough.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's latest model reportedly solves a longstanding mathematics problem, signaling a new era for AI in science. Meanwhile, Meta deploys a new inference scaling system called SOLARIS, boosting ad revenue by nearly 0.7%. In hardware, China's Dishan Technology reports a 2nm AI chip design breakthrough.
item.itunes:summary: OpenAI's latest model reportedly solves a longstanding mathematics problem, signaling a new era for AI in science. Meanwhile, Meta deploys a new inference scaling system called SOLARIS, boosting ad revenue by nearly 0.7%. In hardware, China's Dishan Technology reports a 2nm AI chip design breakthrough.

item.title: Cybersecurity AI: OpenAI vs. Anthropic's new arms race — Apr 15
item.description: OpenAI and Anthropic are escalating competition with new AI models specialized for cybersecurity, drawing reactions from top banks. This comes as the 2026 Stanford AI Index confirms rapid model improvement and rising costs, and new agentic tools from Google and Anthropic signal a shift toward automated, domain-specific AI.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI and Anthropic are escalating competition with new AI models specialized for cybersecurity, drawing reactions from top banks. This comes as the 2026 Stanford AI Index confirms rapid model improvement and rising costs, and new agentic tools from Google and Anthropic signal a shift toward automated, domain-specific AI.
item.itunes:summary: OpenAI and Anthropic are escalating competition with new AI models specialized for cybersecurity, drawing reactions from top banks. This comes as the 2026 Stanford AI Index confirms rapid model improvement and rising costs, and new agentic tools from Google and Anthropic signal a shift toward automated, domain-specific AI.
